calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rudy A. Cordova, Plaintiff/Respondent, appears in pro per, with witness Bertha Cordova.
No appearance by the Defendant/Appellant, Eoin O'Neill.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Rudy A. Cordova, plaintiff/respondent testifies on his own behalf. Bertha Cordova testifies on behalf of Mr.Cordova.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court renders judgment in favor of the plaintiff/respondent, Rudy A. Cordova and against the appellant/defendant Eoin O'Neill for the total amount of $4,200.00.

JPT Richard Wise, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
